query: Count all 1 km grid cells in Kristiansand municipality that intersect 200-year storm-surge areas.

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry (kommunenummer and omrade)

2.description: get 1km grid cells (id, objid, geom) for later spatial join

3.description: get 200-year storm-surge polygons from stormflo200ar_klimaarna (omrade geometry)

4.description: reduce stormflohavniva 200-year polygons to those intersecting Kristiansand municipality

5.description: find grid cells that intersect the reduced 200-year storm-surge polygons

6.description: count distinct 1km grid cell ids that intersect the 200-year storm-surge polygons

executions.sql: SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';
SELECT id, objid, geom FROM statistiskrutenett1km WHERE ST_Intersects(geom, (SELECT ST_Envelope(omrade) FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '4204'));
